stages.name: Stage 1
stages.description: Early vampirism — modest attribute bonuses with growing weaknesses to fire and sunlight.
stages.bonus: Health, magicka, and stamina increase by 50. Frost resistance +25%. Sneak +15%. Melee damage +5%. Fire resistance -75%.
bonusDetails: Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Deity shrine and follower effects reduced by 75%.
Normal healing spells and potions do not affect vampires.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

stages.name: Stage 2
stages.description: Hungry vampire — stronger bonuses and waterbreathing, with harsher fire weakness.
stages.bonus: Health, magicka, and stamina increase by 75. Waterbreathing. Frost resistance +40%. Sneak +20%. Melee damage +10%. Fire resistance -85%.
bonusDetails: Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Deity shrine and follower effects reduced by 65%.
Normal healing spells and potions do not affect vampires.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

stages.name: Stage 3
stages.description: Starving vampire — powerful resistances and combat bonuses with severe fire vulnerability.
stages.bonus: Health, magicka, and stamina increase by 100. Poison and disease resistance +100%. Frost resistance +60%. Sneak +25%. Melee damage +15%. Fire resistance -100%.
bonusDetails: Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Deity shrine and follower effects reduced by 55%.
Normal healing spells and potions do not affect vampires.
Aedric Presence debuff when inside temples.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

stages.name: Stage 4
stages.description: Fully realized vampire — peak power with devastating fire weakness.
stages.bonus: Health and stamina +100, magicka +125. Movement speed +10%. Armor rating +100. Unarmed damage +30. Frost resistance +50%. Sneak +30%. Melee damage +20%. Fire resistance -150%.
bonusDetails: Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Deity shrine and follower effects reduced by 45%.
Normal healing spells and potions do not affect vampires.
Aedric Presence debuff when inside temples.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.

argonian.name: Aquatic Predator
argonian.description: Your Argonian blood allows you to sate your Vampiric hunger by catching docile fish.

breton.name: Dolmen Haunt
breton.description: Your Breton heritage allows you to sate your Vampiric hunger by activating a Standing Stone, once a day.

dunmer.name: Promiscuous
dunmer.description: Your Dark Elven blood copies the racial Vampire ability of the race you prey on. You can have only one at a time.

altmer.name: Pale Gold
altmer.description: Your High Elven blood slows Vampiric hunger by 100% and you gain Vampiric ranks 30% faster, if you are Sated.

imperial.name: Connoisseur
imperial.description: Your Imperial sophistication enables you to bottle a Potion of Blood when you Drain a victim.

khajiit.name: Prey Drive
khajiit.description: Your Khajiit fangs enable you to sate your Vampiric hunger by using or consuming Human Flesh or Human Hearts.

nord.name: Preserved Blood
nord.description: Your Nord heritage grants 10% to bottle a Potion of Blood when looting people you killed.

orsimer.name: Battle Hunger
orsimer.description: Your Orc strength enables you to Feed or Drain in combat by activating an enemy person who is bleeding out.

redguard.name: Mummified Body
redguard.description: Your Redguard blood slows Vampiric hunger by 50% and you gain Vampiric ranks 15% faster.

bosmer.name: Blood Hunt
bosmer.description: Your Wood Elven heritage grants 10% to bottle a Potion of Blood when looting animals you killed.

forms.name: Werewolf
forms.description: Curse of the werewolf — enhanced physical power, disease immunity, and beast-form perks with silver vulnerability.
forms.bonus: Health +50. Stamina +50. Carry weight +25. Disease resistance +1000%. Unarmed damage +15. Stamina regeneration +25%. Strong Stomach (raw and bestial food safe). Poison resistance -50%.
bonusDetails: Immune to all diseases (1000% disease resistance).
Take 2× damage from silver and holy weapons.
Cannot take the Silent Dovah trait.
Lycanthropic Speed: movement speed +10% in and out of beast form.
Lycanthropic Regen: regenerate health and stamina in and out of beast form.
Call of the Blood: at night, chance to be forced into beast form based on moon phase.

altmer.name: Golden Mane
altmer.description: Your High Elven blood grants 15% bonus magic resistance in beast form.

argonian.name: Rabies
argonian.description: Your Argonian blood adds poison damage based on level to your attacks in beast form.

bosmer.name: Moonchaser
bosmer.description: Your Wood Elven blood grants 10% extra movement speed in beast form.

breton.name: Skinwalker
breton.description: Your Breton blood reduces the cooldown of Beast Form by 50%.

dunmer.name: Raging Hatred
dunmer.description: Your Dark Elven blood extends the duration of Beast Form by 60 seconds.

imperial.name: Pack Leader
imperial.description: Your Imperial blood reduces the cooldown of howls in beast form by 50%.

khajiit.name: Hunting Instinct
khajiit.description: Your Khajiit blood reduces the Stamina cost of power attacks in beast form by 20%.

nord.name: Vargr
nord.description: Your Nord blood grants 20% bonus attack damage for 30 seconds after feeding in beast form.

orsimer.name: Primal Rage
orsimer.description: Your Orc blood halves attack damage taken for 15 seconds upon activating Beast Form.

redguard.name: Strong Stomach
redguard.description: Your Redguard blood restores 100 points of Stamina when you feed in beast form.
